ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Reference to the district code */,
  "constituency_description" TEXT /* Description of the constituency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_stations" (
  "polling_station_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each polling station */,
  "polling_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "constituency_code" TEXT /* Reference to the constituency code */,
  "no_of_electors" INTEGER /* Number of registered electors at the polling station */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the polling station is a main station */,
  "is_small" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the polling station is a small station */,
  "polling_station_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the polling station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the polling station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_station_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_stations_constituency_code FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_code") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "polling_station_code" TEXT /* Reference to the polling station code */,
  "election_cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election cycle ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the voter turnout record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the voter turnout record */,
  "num_voters" INTEGER /* Number of voters at the specified time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_polling_station_code FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_code") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_cycle_id") REFERENCES election_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, security personnel) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the election cycle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the election cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the election cycle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
